metadata.title: Default New Tab Page
metadata.description: Default New Tab Page Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to open when a new tab is created. (Except for the new tab page, the respective plugin needs to be enabled.)
ast.target: 创建新标签页时打开什么。（除了新标签页页面外，相应的插件需要启用。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path of the note that will be opened in new tabs. Images and PDFs also work. Only takes effect when the setting above is 'New Tab Page'.
ast.target: 将在新标签页中打开的笔记路径。图片和 PDF 也适用。仅当上述设置为“新标签页页面”时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the mode in which the default new tab page will be opened.
ast.target: 选择默认新标签页页面的打开模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable compatibility mode for other plugins (e.g. Obsidian Projects) which open new tabs. This introduces minor delays.
ast.target: 为其他打开新标签页的插件（例如 Obsidian Projects）启用兼容模式。这会引入轻微延迟。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Plugin for the New Tab Page is not enabled.
ast.target: 新标签页页面插件未启用。
